prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime fashion illustration of an elegant silver-haired gothic-lolita girl standing full body in a dark crystal palace. The character has extremely long flowing icy silver-blue hair, pale skin, a slim figure, and her face is intentionally hidden by a centered plain matte gray square overlay. She wears an extravagant ice blue, white, black, and sapphire asymmetrical gothic-lolita kimono dress with layered ruffled skirt, lace-trimmed wide sleeves, translucent veils, and many dangling jewel ornaments. Use exactly these visible outfit elements: 1 tiny tilted top hat with blue ribbons and crystal decorations, 1 lace veil flowing from the hat, 1 choker and layered gemstone necklace set, 1 structured black corset obi belt with silver chains, 1 large black bow at the waist with a bright blue faceted gem centerpiece, 1 short plaid black-and-blue overskirt panel, 1 white ruffled underskirt, 2 wide kimono sleeves, 2 thigh-high stockings with mismatched colors, 1 black stocking on the left leg, 1 white stocking on the right leg, 2 platform Mary Jane shoes, 1 black shoe on the left foot, and 1 white shoe on the right foot, both decorated with sapphire crystal buckles. Her pose is graceful and doll-like: one hand lifted near the face, the other hand extended outward, knees slightly bent, toes pointed inward. The environment is a glossy black reflective floor with mirror-like reflections, surrounded by glowing prismatic blue crystals and hanging diamond-shaped crystal pendants. Include exactly 4 large crystal clusters or obelisks around the edges, 2 on the left side and 2 on the right side, plus many small suspended diamond crystals sparkling in the background. Lighting is dramatic, high contrast, luminous sapphire and icy cyan highlights, glittering refractions, star-like sparkles, ultra-polished fantasy fashion art, intricate lace, delicate chains, transparent fabric, jewel shine, cinematic depth, no text, no watermark. Style should be premium anime illustration with ornate costume-design focus, sharp clean linework, hyper-detailed fabrics, and a luxurious winter crystal aesthetic.
